mapper.select: SELECT id, name, account, password, status FROM sys_user WHERE account = #{account} AND password = #{password} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, account, password, status FROM sys_user
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (name, account, password, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{account}, #{password}, #{status})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user
name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
